what_was_requested: ETAP 1: ML Model Feature (cf_model_predict) - train CatBoost model, publish as custom feature, run standalone backtest
what_was_done: 1. Prepared and materialized model training dataset (17,544 rows, 12 input features: OHLCV + rsi_1 + atr_1 + cf_regime_strength_1h + cf_chop_filter_1h + cf_vol_regime_1h + hour + dow + iv_est_1 + cl_1h + cl_4h). 2. Trained CatBoost binary classifier (btc_model_predict_clf@20260407173653-d5da2d) with val_accuracy=0.595, val_roc_auc=0.613, test_accuracy=0.576, test_roc_auc=0.597. Model is deployable to feature runtime. 3. Scaffolded and attempted to publish cf_model_predict feature - FAILED twice due to 60s validation timeout (infrastructure bottleneck, not model issue). 4. Cloned regime-gate strategy as ml-model-predict-test (snapshot@v2). 5. Ran baseline backtest (2025-01-01 to 2026-03-20): net_pnl=$422.70, sharpe=1.84, PF=1.66, WR=52.3%, 86 trades, max_dd=2.50%. 6. Ran diagnostics analysis (job analysis-2630ecfe6951). 7. Recorded research result + milestone. 8. Added model to Gold Collection.
error: cf_model_predict feature publish failed twice with 60s validation timeout. Model is trained and deployable, but the custom feature upsert could not complete. Baseline backtest used regime-gate logic without cf_model_predict.
raw_output:
